candidate.objective: Experienced Civil and Pipeline Supervisor with over 13 years in energy, civil, and mining construction, and more than 10 years in senior construction supervision roles. Mark brings strong expertise in pipeline project management, poly welding, hot tap and squeeze-off operations, and multi-front construction supervision. His career spans major projects for Santos, Arrow Energy, Origin Energy, QGC, Senex, Rio Tinto, and FMG across Queensland, Western Australia, and South Australia. A strong safety leader with a zero-harm focus, excellent mentoring capability, and the technical depth to manage complex pipeline and civil construction programmes.

duties: Conducted daily pre-start meetings to ensure crews were briefed on scope, safety, and schedule.
Managed construction of 33km of pipeline from mobilisation through to completion.
Oversaw installation of electrical panels and construction of bore pads.
Set performance goals and deadlines in alignment with the company's schedule and vision.
Monitored work sites by completing safety and environmental audits to ensure safe systems of work.
Applied solid working knowledge of cost control, quality control, inventory management, material management, and production scheduling.
Liaised with local councils and utility service providers to coordinate works.
Managed risk and opportunity, and supervised multi-front construction activities.
Prioritised and allocated crews and work activities to meet productivity and quality targets.
Coached and counselled employees to improve performance and conducted daily toolbox talks and reports.
Oversaw hydrostatic and pneumatic testing, coordinated subcontractors, and organised crews, materials, and plant.

skills.detail: Extensive experience managing HDPE pipeline construction from 63mm to 800mm, including multi-front supervision, crew management, schedule and budget compliance, and stakeholder coordination across QLD, WA, and SA.
Certified Hot Tap and Squeeze Off technician with hands-on experience performing and overseeing hot tap operations on high-pressure gas and water lines.
Skilled poly welder experienced with Dixon (225/350/450), McElroy (MC618/T900), and butt fusion and electrofusion welding techniques across a wide range of pipe sizes.
Proven capability in cost control, quality management, HSEQ compliance, subcontractor coordination, risk management, and multi-front construction delivery.
Strong leader with experience managing and mentoring pipeline and civil construction crews. Skilled in conducting toolbox talks, coaching employees, and driving performance improvements.
